summary: Frontend-only testing of 4 bug fixes: JetBrains Mono font, Dashboard geographic map, Wisconsin visibility, Vendor Status grouping, UniFi Devices empty state.

issues: Wisconsin (upper-left region) appears as a dark blue-gray region to the left of Michigan — it IS visible with fill #13131F and stroke #2C2C40, confirming the fix works. The state blends somewhat with the background (#030305) but is distinguishable.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 reported bugs are fixed and verified: (1) JetBrains Mono applied site-wide via index.css; (2) Dashboard map is now geographic react-simple-maps (Michigan+surrounding states with SD-WAN mesh lines); (3) Wisconsin (FIPS 55) is visible on NetworkMap with #13131F fill; (4) Vendor Status shows 21 vendors in 6 categories (Security/Microsoft/AI/Cloud/Telecom/Other); (5) UniFi Devices shows 'NO CONTROLLERS CONFIGURED' empty state with settings guidance.
